# Point of Sale - Technical Pricelists

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:f6138dc8225efb9675d48e223d79a902befe521bb2ae3f46418b277f02a22c59
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of Point of Sale to prevent
technical pricelists that are used for the
computation of other pricelists from being selected.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

- First configure the main module `sale_pricelist_technical`.
- Configure your pricelist on your pos config form.

:::{figure} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/pos/16.0/pos_pricelist_technical/static/description/pos_config_form.png
:::

## Usage

- Open the point of sale
- Click on 'Pricelist' Button. Only non technical pricelists are displayed

:::{figure} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/pos/16.0/pos_pricelist_technical/static/description/pos_front_end_ui.png
:::
